item.description: A modular shared-memory high-performance framework for multiscale cardiac multiphysics simulations.

item.title: rtrelease/Jetson-Symbolics-Neuromorphics
item.description: Integrating Symbolic Programming and Neuromorphic Modeling for Edge Labs with NVIDIA Jetson, DGX Spark, and GPU-based DNN/ML Systems

item.title: Qyxxlor/Leap-Ai-Make-Your-Ai-Api-Chat-Music-Coding
item.description: An AI development platform that allows users to build custom AI models through an API, supporting chatbots, music generation, and coding tools to streamline creative and technical workflows.

item.title: calderast/jdb_to_nwb
item.description: Converts electrophysiology, photometry, and behavioral data for the hex maze task used by the Berke Lab at UCSF to NWB format.

item.title: sethigris/axiom
item.description: A bare-metal, tiny deep learning engine in Rust with cross-platform GPU acceleration.

item.title: neuroTUM/Cortical-Peaks-Challenge-2026
item.description: A collection of arcade games built with Python and Pygame, designed and implemented to serve as the competition environment for the Cortical Peaks Challenge at the Graz BCI Conference 2026

item.description: Axon is a spiking, biologically-based neural model driven by predictive error-driven learning, for systems-level models of the brain
